title: Verify existing implementation of CSV export utility
description: The CSV export utility already exists at src/utils/csv-export.ts with the toCsv function and comprehensive tests in src/utils/csv-export.test.ts. All 8 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/utils/csv-export.ts: Single-function utility module following the codebase pattern of co-located .test.ts files in src/utils/
